title: Logging and Distributed Tracing for Quantum Applications
description: Implement structured logging and distributed tracing for quantum applications to enable debugging, performance analysis, and audit trails across hybrid classical-quantum systems.
learningObjectives: Design structured logging schemas for quantum circuit execution and results
Implement distributed tracing across classical preprocessing, quantum execution, and post-processing
Configure log aggregation with Elasticsearch or similar systems
Create correlation IDs that track quantum jobs through the entire pipeline
Build audit trails for quantum experiment reproducibility
Integrate with OpenTelemetry for unified observability
